content.en:
"Immortal Spear!"

The Black Immortal Controller performed this technique of his, and his body seemed to turn into a black immortal spear, shattering all time and space.

When the Ancient Demon Controller saw this move of the Black Decay Controller, he exclaimed: "The Black Immortal Senior Brother has performed this move, I don't know if the little junior brother can block it, but the Black Immortal Senior Brother used this trick to directly hit a powerful Ten Realms level controller!"

"It's such a terrible move, it's locked, and you can't dodge it no matter what!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

But he wasn't ready to dodge.

He directly played his hole card - the perfect body!

Rumble!!!

The perfect body broke out, and Ye Tian's combat power reached its peak.

Ye Tian erupted with a perfect body and the Space-Time Rift Blade, colliding with the Immortal Spear of the Black Decay Controller.

Bang!!!!

The surrounding endless space-time shattered, and a terrifying shockwave swept around, spreading to an unknown distance.

And Ye Tian and the Black Decay Controller were both shocked and fled, and every time they took a step back, a space-time shattered, although Ye Tian was shot farther away, more like a headlong into layers of space-time, they couldn't control their bodies.

However, the Devouring Mountain's physique coupled with the perfect body allowed Ye Tian to absorb a lot of damage, so he was only shocked and did not suffer too much damage.

And the physique of the Black Decay Controller is not as good as Ye Tian, it is still cracking at the moment, but it heals quickly, and the impact is not great.

This collision, whether it was Ye Tian or the Black Decay Controller, it was a tie.

"Little junior brother, your physical body is too powerful, even if I cast the Immortal Spear, I can't help you!" the Black Decay Controller was shocked.

"In terms of attack power, Senior Brother Black Decay is still powerful, I just relied on my physique to absorb the damage!" Ye Tian said.

"Junior brother, don't be modest, let's settle it as a draw!" said the Black Decay Master.

"That's a tie!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

At this time, the Snow Maiden Controller came over and exclaimed, "Little Senior Brother, you are so amazing, you are able to draw with Senior Brother Black Decay!"

While Ye Tian was chatting with them, on Wanyuan Mountain, the Ten Elements Ancestor also cast his gaze over.

"My little apprentice is a little amazing, I can see many of his methods before, but his methods this time are beyond my cognition!"

The Ten Elements Ancestor was shocked.

Suddenly, a thought appeared in his mind.

"Maybe Ye Tian has hope to surpass me in the future and reach another realm!" muttered the Ten Elements Ancestor.

If Ye Tian really found a way to break through to the next realm, maybe he would have hope to break through, and he wouldn't be at this half-step level until now.

"It's a pity that I can't break the shackles and chains, and I still can't break this half step!"

As he spoke, a shackle chain appeared at the root of the Ten Elements Ancestor's body, and it was then easily shattered by him.

In fact, he had already shattered nearly sixty or seventy shackles, but it was still useless, and the increase in strength was very small.

Constantly breaking the shackles and chains can only improve his strength, but he can't completely cross this level.

......

Not long afterward, Ye Tian was separated from the Black Decay Controller, the Ancient Demon Controller, and the Snow Maiden Controller.

And Ye Tian went back to continue his cultivation, and at this time, his strength spread throughout the entire Origin Realm Sea.

Although his battle with the Black Decay Controller was not exposed, the movement of his condensation into a perfect body was too great, so in the eyes of many Eternal Controllers, Ye Tian's current strength had been ranked second only to the Black Decay Controller, and it was the top level of the Origin Realm Sea.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to cultivate and improve, and he still had considerable room for improvement in the Ten Realm-level Controller Realm.

For example, he can also take some treasures that increase the will of the Transformation Realm, as well as treasures that improve the primordial level control body, and can also improve the perfect body.

In addition, he could also continuously absorb the origin of the Origin Realm Sea to improve his body.

After all, his current degree of origin assimilation is only more than one percent, and he is still a long way from seventy percent.

Time flies, Ye Tian has been cultivating hard, and his strength is growing in a very slow way.

At the same time, Ye Tian's shackles and chains were also breaking one after another.

However, the further back you go, the more time you need to break one shackle chain, the more you want to break the shackles, the more you want to break the thirty-six shackles, it will take you an unknown number of billions of years.

In addition, Ye Tian was still doing one thing, that is, looking for a treasure that could transform the copying talent.

One of his copy bodies was looking for it in the Origin Realm Sea, and a clone of his will was looking for it outside the Realm, and they all carried the talent of copying anyway, so they could all be found.

However, he searched for a long time, but he couldn't find a treasure that could attract the copying talent, so he didn't have much hope.

However, Ye Tian still didn't give up, after all, once he found it, the copying talent could be upgraded, and for him, it was like an unimaginable opportunity!

A billion river years!

Twenty-one years of the river!

Before you know it, the Origin Realm Sea has passed six billion realm river years.

For Ye Tian, this is also a very long time, and his strength has improved greatly.

At this time, the origin of the Origin Realm Sea had no effect on Ye Tian, but it only made his origin assimilation level reach thirty percent, and the Primal Spirit Spring Liquid was almost exhausted.

In addition, Ye Tian broke twenty-nine shackles and chains, and the shackles and chains behind him were really a little too difficult to break.

And Ye Tian also exchanged the Life White Stone for a lot of resources and treasures that helped to improve the will of the Transformation Realm and the primordial-level control body, and improved his strength a lot.

Now, Ye Tian is the one who should be promoted has been promoted.

Moreover, he raised the change of a seed path to nearly a billion kinds, and cultivated the perfect body to the realm of Xiaocheng.

Now, Ye Tian's strength is much stronger than when he was fighting with the Black Decay Controller.

Although Ye Tian didn't continue to compete with the Black Decay Controller, he felt that his strength had surpassed the Black Decay Controller, and now he didn't say that he was the first in the Ten Realms Controller, but it was about the same.

And during this period of time, the Origin Realm Sea was also very calm.

But at this moment, the Ten Elements Ancestor, the Selfless True Ancestor, the Realm Ancestor, the Primordial Ancestor, the Black Emperor Ancestor, and other beings that transcended the Ten Realms gathered together one by one.

At this moment, they were discussing a big matter, about the Origin Realm Sea.

In the silent void of the Origin Realm Sea, they all sat here, almost every one of them had a slightly ugly face.
